headline: Twilio To Rally Over 25%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
summary: Analysts changed outlook on top names, RBC raised CC price target, DA Davidson lowered MSA target, Oppenheimer cut CRNX target, Macquarie raised IREN target, JP Morgan cut MCD target, Citi slashed WHR target, Susquehanna raised NET target, Scotiabank raised NTR target.
